reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar, ideal para descansar yendo o viniendo de la costa, ypf con comidas y pelotero, parrila un bosque con mesas! De todo un poco, todo limpio y cuidado

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place, ideal for relaxing on the way to or from the coast. YPF offers food and a baseball field, a barbecue area, and a forest with tables! A little bit of everything, everything clean and well-maintained.
